summary: Completed testing of ICS Calendar Export feature for Outlook integration. All 15 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: 'Outlook kalendář' button in BookingsPage header, 'Přidat do Outlooku (.ics)' button in booking detail modal. Public booking success page has ICS button (code verified).
critical_code_review_comments: ICS endpoints are public (no auth required) - correct for calendar subscription use case
calendar_export.py uses icalendar library correctly with VCALENDAR, VEVENT components
Europe/Prague timezone properly set via X-WR-TIMEZONE header
Content-Type: text/calendar and Content-Disposition: attachment headers correctly set
BookingsPage 'Outlook kalendář' button uses user.institution_id for ICS feed URL
Booking detail modal 'Přidat do Outlooku' button uses selectedBooking.id for single reservation ICS
Public BookingPage success screen uses createdReservationId state for ICS download
Email service _generate_ics_attachment method creates ICS attachment for confirmation emails
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo institution with ~52 reservations
context_for_next_testing_agent: ICS Calendar Export fully tested. Institution ID: 669e71b2-a8e7-4eb0-ac13-8b8c4f3107a5. ICS endpoints: GET /api/calendar/institution/{id}.ics, GET /api/calendar/program/{id}.ics, GET /api/calendar/reservation/{id}.ics. All endpoints are public (no auth). Status filter supported: ?status=confirmed. Frontend buttons: data-testid='export-ics-feed-btn' (header), data-testid='add-to-outlook-btn' (modal), data-testid='success-add-to-outlook-btn' (public success page).

verified_features.feature: Backend: GET /api/calendar/institution/{id}.ics returns valid ICS with VCALENDAR, VEVENT
Backend: GET /api/calendar/program/{id}.ics returns ICS for program's reservations only
Backend: GET /api/calendar/reservation/{id}.ics returns ICS for single reservation
Backend: ICS response has Content-Type: text/calendar and Content-Disposition: attachment
Backend: ICS feed with status filter ?status=confirmed works
Frontend: BookingsPage header shows 'Outlook kalendář' button
Frontend: Booking detail modal shows 'Přidat do Outlooku (.ics)' button
Frontend: Public booking success page has 'Přidat do Outlooku' button (code verified)
